name: Murphy USA Inc.
summary: Part I Murphy USA Inc. ("Murphy USA", the "Company", "we", "us", or "our") was incorporated in Delaware on March 1, 2013 and holds, through its subsidiaries, the former U.S. retail marketing business of its former parent company, Murphy Oil Corporation (Murphy Oil), plus other assets and liabilities of Murphy Oil that supported the activities of the U.S. retail marketing operations.
